children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Requirements for a Level 1 or Level 2 acquisition project or program under sections 1131 through 1134 shall not apply to an acquisition by the Coast Guard that is a service life extension program.

children.heading: .—Service Life Extension Program Defined
children.label: b .—Service Life Extension Program Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “service life extension program” means a capital investment that is solely intended to extend the service life and address obsolescence of components or systems of a particular capability or asset.
